raw_input:
[3.0/5] A little to nervous to try After reading the instructions and seeing a inconsistency and it saying not to use it on damaged hair I'm pretty nervous. Also it says not to band it for 3 or 4 days but I always have mine back. I think I'll have to wait till I'm really annoyed with my frizz which I thought I was going to be fighting.
Havent tried it (yet)
Also why would you want a curling hair mist? Now I'm confused
Once you wash your hair does to go back to normal? Unsure [5.0/5] Got Rid of a Cowlick! Success at Once Self Straight Magic Perm at Home Easy & Fast Made in Korea... and my thoughts.

I won't go into the instructions because they are clearly defined on the product page when you scroll down and see "Products Description", it is easy and accurate.

The scent is obviously of hair treatment for the straightening but not that bad, to me. I only used it on a cowlick and it did great! I followed the steps and combed the cowlick down and kept it that way and it is now not an issue for me. I am a man, have platinum (naturally) hair, and despise my cowlick. But, for now, it is gone! And no color issues at all.

It says to use the open product within 7-9 days, so, I have no idea how long this should last. If I need to use it again within that timeframe, I will be back! So far, it does what it says! [4.0/5] One-Step Magic Straightening Perm Kit I have semi-curly but puffy hair that I need to tame at least once every 3-4 months. Otherwise, I have to straighten my hair every day to look decent. I have been using this Japanese product which is a 2-step for the straightening and neutralizing. It usually takes a total of 3 hours or more to go through the entire process, with 45 mins session for each treatment steps and then the drying and straightening hair in between. I was really intrigued with the one-step because it saves so much time.

The order comes with magic straightening kit to do at home. There are instruction manuals in both Korean and English. It gives you step by step instructions that are very clear and easy to follow. The bottle already comes with the treatment. All you need to do it apply. Before you do this, there are hair treatment packets to use prior and after the treatment to protect your hair from excessive damage. The kit also comes with plastic cover for your shoulders and a brush for application.

I applied it over the top area because my hair is pretty long and really you should only target the new hair growth if you've done the treatment previously. If it was my first time I probably would not have enough treatment for my long hair. I would need to order two.

The instruction states to check after 10 minutes. Every hair is different so you will have to assess if you need to leave it on longer. The instruction specifies the duration and also guides you on how to check if your hair is ready to be washed out. If you pull one strand and you notice the curls are gone, then it's probably time to wash them. I left mine on for 40 minutes. I don't recommend it but I needed to from past experience because my hair is crazy. You rinse out the treatment but it tells you not to rub them. Just wash them through gently with your fingers. I applied the hair mist after washing it out, because you can feel the hair stiffen. Then I proceeded to blow dry and straighten the hair.

I washed my hair again after 2 days and sure enough the treatment worked. I do feel that because of the dryness, I still need to straighten the hair some, but definitely better than having to sit every morning and straighten the entirety of the hair.

For an avid magic straightening perm treatment user, I do recommend the product. I suggest getting additional product to make sure you revive your hair after treatment. [5.0/5] Magic!! This magic perm is just that magic!! Simple step-by-step instructions help you get through it with ease!! The results are unbelievable and don't take long at all. Doesn't have too strong of a smell. And the mist you put in your hair after helps it feel shiny and soft. Highly recommend for anybody to try especially with super curly hair. Great value for the money. [4.0/5] Home treatment straight perm I have seen great results with the first application to my daughter’s wavy and unmanageable hair. It also made her hair look shiny, and less tangled. The kit is easy to follow and it comes with an applicator brush and comb. I suggest that the 5 mls in sachets could have been more for a repeat application. [3.0/5] Manual not included Mine didn't come with an English manual although it looks like other reviewers have gotten them. Maybe it's a hit or miss thing. I would suggest a downloadable file to be included with the listing. [5.0/5] My Phillips I cousin loved this product! She has been chemically straightening her hair since she was young. I made the mistake of thinking this was a curl permanent (not even sure there is a difference) but I called her to come over last night and use this with me anyways

This comes with a very VERY thorough instruction book, which has been translated well from the korean language. I appreciated that, but she just set to work telling me how to do it and I was her little hair dresser.

Her hair has ALWAYS looked straight to me, but she tells me that’s because of products like these. So her hair looked a little textured before but still straight, and after this treatment, just plain straight once again.

Very cool! She experienced no bad side effects and only had to have the softening lotion in her hair for about 10 minutes as was directed. [4.0/5] SOMEWHAT, STRAIGTENS CURLY HAIR IT DOES WORK WELL, BUT FOR A MORE POLISHED SMOOTHNESS. MY HAIR WILL STILL REQUIRE SOME FORM OF HEATING TOOLS ( ELECTRIC PRESSING COMB, HOT AIR BRUSH, OR FLAT IRON) FOR FULL STRAIGHTENING COMPLETION. ALSO AT THIS TIME, UNSURE OF WHAT LENGTH OF TIME THE MAGIC PERM WILL LAST. USUALLY, NATURAL CURLY HAIR RETURNS, PER SHAMPOOING, AND CREAM PERMS MAINTAIN THE STRAIGHT LOOK PER SHAMPOOING. ONLY TIME WILL TELL, WHAT SUCCESS THIS LIQUID PERM OFFERS.SO FOUR STARS ARE GIVEN, FOR SAFELY CHANGING THE CURL PATTERN. [5.0/5] This works like a charm. I got a perm at a salon and I literally looked like Hagrid from Harry potter. I was not happy with it. was very concerned about my hair getting damaged after getting a perm. So I used on wet hair and still worked great. You are supposed to use this product on 70% dry hair? depending on your hairs condition. Worked great for me!! [1.0/5] Take your best guess as to how to apply it It claims to be so simple you can do it in one step? The trick is that you have to figure out what that step is. The bottle says One-step self magic perm, not straightener, PERM, and clearly with 3 packages inside the box there will be more than 1 step. The back of the bottle says to avoid getting product on your scalp? Hmm, that could be a problem since it's meant to go on your hair. It doesn't mention how long you leave it on, if you apply to damp or dry hair, and the white packet claims to be a hair "mist" yet it does not come in or with a misting applicator/spray bottle? I really wanted to be able to test this product out but when it comes to chemicals being applied to my hair, I tend to be a bit hesitant and want very specific directions. If they had been clear with their instructions, and if it was able to straighten my hair even a little bit, I would have given them more stars. [4.0/5] Regardless of proper instruction, it works I used it this weekend. First, one star is deducted for inadequate English instruction. I had to go through the website and follow someone else's instructions to fit on it. But, does it work? Yes, but not in the way you do it in the salon. I followed the following instructions:

1. Use 5ml of the protein care hair treatment included in the kit. I used my protein hair mask because it didn't feel like enough.
2. After waiting for the hair to appear to have soaked in the protein care, I sectioned it from the back with the self straight magic perm. I started at the front, but that didn't work, so I moved on to the back of my hair. Before washing it, I waited for it to appear dry. After 40 minutes, I washed.
3. I then ironed it, despite the fact that the instructions do not suggest or mention it. I'm not aware of any such thing in Korean.
4. After ironing, I applied 5ml of the included hair mist. I'm not sure if I should have washed, but I didn't. After 24 hours, I did my hair. I have both before and after pictures. [4.0/5] Works well as a perm. Directions are included and so is a huge bottle of perming solution. I’m not too sure if we can reuse the bottle but I hope we can… I plan on just perming my bangs because there’s a cowlick. Keep in mind it’s straight perm solution! Read precautions and good luck!! 👍 [5.0/5] It works! I was skeptical at first. I did as the instructions said and everything worked out fine! My hair is straight now and I didn’t have to spend a fortune! [5.0/5] it does the job worked on my frizzy curly hair...did not even hurt my scalp the smell is not that good/pleasant but it did the job better than the salon...will definitely purchase it again. [3.0/5] This wasn’t effective for me Maybe I used it incorrectly but I patch tested it on my skin first as you should with any new treatment and it turned my skin red. I did not end up putting this on my head for fear of damage [5.0/5] Works well- not as good as two step process Works very well, applied on whole head and left for 40 minutes. I usually do the two step process but this was a lot faster. It doesn't straighten all the way, so will need multiple applications. Left my hair really soft and manageable!

response:
Reviews for magic perm straightening kit:

Most say product work. Hair come out straight, soft, shiny. Many happy with cowlick fix. Curly hair tamed. Some say better than salon. Fast compared to two-step process. Kit come with brush, comb, shoulder cover, hair mist, protein packets. Instructions in Korean and English, some say clear, some say confusing or missing English manual. Smell strong but not terrible. Hair mist help with softness after treatment. Most leave on 40 minutes. Some need two kits for thick hair. One person get skin reaction from patch test. One person confused by instructions, could not figure out proper use. Some unsure how long results last after washing. Few say need heat tools after for full straight look. Overall majority recommend product, especially for curly or wavy hair. Good value for money compared to salon visit.
